name: Grade 6 Travel & Global Citizenship — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 6 pathway for analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Travel & Global Citizenship. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 6 knowledge and transferable skills in analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Travel & Global Citizenship.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about analyzing systems, using disciplinary tools, and supporting claims through Travel & Global Citizenship and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
